basics.name: Jesse Copas
basics.label: Technical Engineer | IT Support | Endpoint Deployment | Automation
basics.summary: Technical Engineer focused on IT support, endpoint deployment, automation, Active Directory tooling, and practical systems improvement.

work.name: Microworx
work.summary: Develops in-house support tools, imaging workflows, benchmarking tools, and ticketing modernization work.
highlights: Develop in-house tools for imaging, benchmarking, ticketing modernization, and repeatable endpoint deployment.
Built an imaging workflow using VSS live imaging and delta merging to reduce recurring software costs and deployment time.
Refactored legacy Perl/PHP ticketing and SQL workflows into a more maintainable Python-based environment.
Partner with business clients on technical support, system design, hardware specification, and project execution.

work.name: Hemmersbach US LLC
work.summary: Enterprise field service across HP laptops, desktops, printers, servers, and storage hardware.
highlights: Handled 2-5 daily field service tickets across routes up to 400 miles for enterprise hardware repair.
Repaired HP laptops, desktops, A3/A4 printers, servers, and storage hardware in client environments.
Performed component replacement, diagnostics, hardware installation, and server network integration.

work.name: Simple Tech Innovations
work.summary: MSP support, deployment, repair, and client troubleshooting.
highlights: Built a deployment automation script that reduced new-computer setup time by 75% and improved consistency.
Supported roughly 150 MSP clients as part of a three-person technical team.
Delivered remote help desk support, on-site troubleshooting, equipment repair, and new hardware deployments.

work.name: University of Rochester Medical Center
work.summary: High-volume healthcare IT support across users, devices, and enterprise applications.
highlights: Supported 45,000 employees, 20,000 devices, and 400+ applications across University of Rochester medical environments.
Worked in a 15-person help desk team handling 500-1000 daily calls.
Built an Active Directory export tool that reduced large user-information requests from hours or days to seconds.
Supported Active Directory, Citrix Workspace, ServiceNow, Epic access issues, account permissions, malware cleanup, and password resets.

projects.name: Automated Computer Setup Script
projects.description: Customizable Windows deployment automation that reduced new computer configuration by more than an hour per machine.

projects.name: Active Directory User Export Tool
projects.description: Active Directory export utility that reduced large user-information requests from hours or days to seconds.

projects.name: DungeonMasterVault
projects.description: Clojure-based PDF generation maintenance for a widely used free SRD 5e character creator.
